reason: Configuring pam_faillock fail_interval is a standard STIG hardening step for account lockout policy. When applied via authselect, it modifies PAM configuration without requiring a reboot and poses minimal risk of lockout if values are reasonable.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Setting fail_interval too low could cause legitimate users to be locked out after normal mistyped passwords; Manual editing of PAM files outside of authselect could lead to misconfiguration
